exercises.code:
def blocking_key(rec):
    parts = rec.get("name", "").split()
    if len(parts) >= 2:
        return parts[1].casefold()  # segundo token ~ apellido paterno
    return parts[0].casefold() if parts else ""
print(blocking_key({"name": "Ana Ramos"}))
print(blocking_key({"name": "Luis"}))

exercises.code:
pairs = [
    {"id": "P1", "score": 0.2},
    {"id": "P2", "score": 0.55},
    {"id": "P3", "score": 0.7},
    {"id": "P4", "score": 0.9},
]
def clerical_queue(pairs, low=0.4, high=0.7):
    return [p for p in pairs if low <= p["score"] < high]
print(clerical_queue(pairs))

exercises.code:
txs = [("A", "B", 10), ("C", "D", 1), ("B", "A", 5)]
def direct_txs(txs, a, b):
    return [t for t in txs if set(t[:2]) == {a, b}]
print(direct_txs(txs, "A", "B"))

def explanation_bullets(er, rel, missing):
    return [
        f"entity_resolution_score={er}",
        f"relationship_signal_score={rel}",
        f"missing_fields={missing}",
    ]
print(explanation_bullets(0.8, 0.3, ["phone"]))
